title: Neeye Vaazhkai Enben Lyrics Pugazh Tamil Movie
stanzas:
Neeye vaazhkai yenbaen
Ini vaazhum
naatkal ellaam.
Neeye podhum yenbaen
Uyire en ulagamey

Neeye kaadhal yenbaen
Ini jeevan vaazhum unnaal.
Neeye vendum yenbaen
Uyire en ulagamey.

Sirikiraalo
konjam sidhaigiren
Nadakiraalo
pinnal alaigiren.
Therindhum ye ho
Ayyo tholaigiren
kaadhalin kaigalil
Vizhugiren.

naatkal ellaam

vaarthai ondru
Naan korkiren.
Yedhirae unnai
paartha udane

Penney un paarvayaale

Aaaha indha neram naanum
Kudaisaaigiren.

Kaadhoramaai unjal kodu
Penney un kammal
pol naan aaduven.
Kaal oramaai siraigal idu
Penney un kolusaaga
naan maaruven

tamilStanzas:
நீயே வாழ்க்கை என்பேன்
இனி வாழும் நாட்கள் எல்லாம்.
நீயே போதும் என்பேன்
உயிரே என் உலகமே

நீயே காதல் என்பேன்
இனி ஜீவன் வாழும் உன்னால்.
நீயே வேண்டும் என்பேன்
உயிரே என் உலகமே.

சிரிக்கிறாளோ
கொஞ்சம் சிதைகிறேன்.
நடக்கிறாளோ
பின்னால் அலைகிறேன்.
தெரிந்துமே ஹோ
ஐயோ தொலைகிறேன்
காதலின் கைகளில் விழுகிறேன்.

நீயே வாழ்க்கை என்பேன்
இனி வாழும் நாட்கள் எல்லாம்.
நீயே போதும் என்பேன்
உயிரே என் உலகமே

எதையோ சொல்ல
வார்த்தை ஒன்று
நான் கோர்க்கிறேன் .
எதிரே உன்னை
பார்த்த உடனே
ஏன் வேர்க்கிறேன் .

பெண்ணே உன் பார்வையாலே
அலைபாய்கிறேன்.
ஆகா இந்த நேரம் நானும்
குடைசாய்கிறேன்.

காதோரமாய் ஊஞ்சல் கொடு
காதோரமாய் ஊஞ்சல் கோடு
பெண்ணே உன் கம்மல் போல்
நான் ஆடுவேன்.
கால் ஓரமாய் சிறைகள் இடு
பெண்ணே  உன் கொலுசாக
நான் மாறுவேன்

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and devotion, emphasizing how essential the beloved is to life.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Pugazh, this song highlights the protagonist's emotional journey and his connection with his love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Arijit Singh and composed by Vivek – Mervin.

When was this song released?

The song was released on August 12, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neeye Vaazhkai Enben, the protagonist expresses his profound love and reliance on his partner, making it a quintessential romantic ballad. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of longing and devotion, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of love. As it unfolds in the movie Pugazh, it serves as a poignant reminder of the significance of love in one's life. The combination of Arijit Singh's emotive singing and the evocative composition creates a lasting impact on the listener.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neeye Vaazhkai Enben from the Pugazh movie is a heartfelt melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Arijit Singh's soulful voice and the poignant lyrics by Na. Muthukumar, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love. The collaboration between Vivek – Mervin's music and Arijit's vocals creates an unforgettable listening experience.
stanzaMeanings: You are my life, I will say this. From now on, every day I live is enough for me, my world is you.
You are my love, I will say this. From now on, my life will live because of you, my world is you.
I am smiling a little, I am feeling a bit shy. Even if I understand, oh, I am lost in the hands of love.
You are my life, I will say this. From now on, every day I live is enough for me, my world is you.
I am searching for a word to say. The moment I see you, why do I feel drawn to you?
Because of your gaze, I am getting lost. Ah, at this moment, I am also getting lost in thoughts.
If love is a swing, then give me a swing. I will dance like your hair. I will change like your beauty.
You are my life, I will say this. From now on, every day I live is enough for me, my world is you.
You are my love, I will say this. From now on, my life will live because of you, my world is you.
I am smiling a little, I am feeling a bit shy. Even if I understand, oh, I am lost in the hands of love.
You are my life, I will say this. You are enough for me, my world is you.
